column2: Verify FDD and HoE Response to Invalid Display Authorization (DA)
column3: ['Set up an MAA-regulated event with a participant flying a civil registered aircraft. ', 'Provide an invalid DA to the FDD for the participant, allowing them to breach any part of the RA. ', 'Verify that the FDD identifies non-compliant areas with MRP in response to the invalid DA. ', 'Verify that the FDD informs the HoE about the identified non-compliant areas with MRP. ', 'Verify that the HoE does not assess any additional risk caused by non-compliance. ']
column4: ['A valid MAA-regulated event is set up with the specified participant and aircraft. ', 'The FDD receives an invalid DA that allows the participant to breach any part of the RA. ', 'The FDD correctly identifies non-compliant areas with MRP in response to the invalid DA. ', 'The FDD successfully communicates the identified non-compliant areas with MRP to the HoE. ', 'The HoE correctly determines that no additional risk is caused by non-compliance. ']
